---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: img/foto_perfil.jpeg
  links:
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mKQRdOEAAAAJ&hl=es
    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}}"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/frzambra.bsky.social
    - text: "{{< fa brands github >}}"
      href: https://github.com/frzambra
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin >}}"
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/frzambra
    # - text: "{{< ai cv >}}"
    #   href: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/robjhyndman/CV@main/RobHyndmanCV.pdf
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      href: mailto:frzambra@gmail.com
toc: false
---

::: about-link-text
**Francisco Zambrano**<br> <span data-en="Spatial Data Scientist in Agriculture & Water Resources" data-es="Científico de Datos Espaciales en Agricultura y Recursos Hídricos">Spatial Data Scientist in Agriculture & Water Resources</span> <br>
:::

## <span data-en="Bio" data-es="Biografía">Bio</span>

<p data-en-html="I am a spatial data scientist and researcher based in Santiago, Chile. My work focuses on environmental sciences, particularly the intersection of climate variability, drought monitoring, water resource management, and agriculture. I specialize in using remote sensing, geospatial analysis, and climate data to understand how environmental changes impact agriculture and ecosystems. I hold a doctorate in agricultural engineer and have published on topics such as vegetation dynamics, long-term drought assessments, and land use change. My research has been cited widely and contributes to both academic knowledge and practical decision-making in climate resilience and sustainable land management. Whether through scientific publications, collaborative projects, or open-source development, My aim is to bridge the gap between data, science, and policy to support more informed environmental decisions." data-es-html="Soy un científico de datos espaciales e investigador radicado en Santiago, Chile. Mi trabajo se centra en las ciencias ambientales, particularmente en la intersección de la variabilidad climática, el monitoreo de sequías, la gestión de recursos hídricos y la agricultura. Me especializo en el uso de teledetección, análisis geoespacial y datos climáticos para comprender cómo los cambios ambientales impactan la agricultura y los ecosistemas. Tengo un doctorado en ingeniería agrícola y he publicado sobre temas como la dinámica de la vegetación, evaluaciones de sequías a largo plazo y cambios en el uso del suelo. Mi investigación ha sido ampliamente citada y contribuye tanto al conocimiento académico como a la toma de decisiones prácticas en resiliencia climática y gestión sostenible de la tierra. Ya sea a través de publicaciones científicas, proyectos colaborativos o desarrollo de código abierto, mi objetivo es cerrar la brecha entre datos, ciencia y políticas para apoyar decisiones ambientales más informadas.">I am a spatial data scientist and researcher based in Santiago, Chile. My work focuses on environmental sciences, particularly the intersection of climate variability, drought monitoring, water resource management, and agriculture. I specialize in using remote sensing, geospatial analysis, and climate data to understand how environmental changes impact agriculture and ecosystems. I hold a doctorate in agricultural engineer and have published on topics such as vegetation dynamics, long-term drought assessments, and land use change. My research has been cited widely and contributes to both academic knowledge and practical decision-making in climate resilience and sustainable land management. Whether through scientific publications, collaborative projects, or open-source development, My aim is to bridge the gap between data, science, and policy to support more informed environmental decisions.</p>

<!-- ## Address -->

<!-- **Mail:** [Hemera Centro de Observación de la Tierra](https://hemera.umayor.cl/), [Universidad Mayor](https://umayor.cl/), Santiago, Chile. -->

<!-- **Office:** Campus Oriente, [Universidad Mayor](https://umayor.cl/), Av. Apoquindo 6901-6947, 7570008 Las Condes, Región Metropolitana, Chile. -->

<!-- <iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d5737.456669745213!2d-70.56030748702727!3d-33.40793509522815!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x9662cec241761341%3A0xf601ad71e2d186c4!2sCampus%20Oriente%20Universidad%20Mayor!5e1!3m2!1ses-419!2scl!4v1754057780120!5m2!1ses-419!2scl" width="600" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe> -->
